name: Koa Pancake House
tagline: Old-school Kaneohe breakfast spot where retirees, surfers, and families all converge over macadamia nut pancakes.
mustOrder: Macadamia nut pancakes — fluffy stacks topped with mac nut syrup
Portuguese sausage, eggs, and rice — the local breakfast standard
Dutch baby pancake — puffy oven-baked pancake with powdered sugar and lemon
parking: Windward Mall parking lot. Plenty of spaces.
talkStory: Koa Pancake House is inside the Windward Mall food court area in Kaneohe — don't let the mall location fool you, it's a legit breakfast institution on the Windward side. Mostly older local crowd in the morning which is always a good sign. Pancakes are big, cheap, and satisfying. Open early and closes mid-afternoon. Not worth a special trip from town, but if you're heading to Kaneohe or the Windward side, it's the breakfast move.
